subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The following highways are designated as the Ports-to-Plains Corridor:
Interstate Highway 35 from the Mexican border at Laredo to its intersection with U.S. Highway 83;
U.S. Highway 83 from its intersection with Interstate Highway 35 to its intersection with U.S. Highway 277 in Carrizo Springs;
U.S. Highway 277 from its intersection with U.S. Highway 83 in Carrizo Springs to its intersection with U.S. Highway 87 in San Angelo;
U.S. Highway 87 from its intersection with U.S. Highway 277 in San Angelo to Sterling City and on to Lamesa;
State Highway 158 from its intersection with U.S. Highway 87 near Sterling City to its intersection with Interstate Highway 20 in Midland;
Interstate Highway 20 from its intersection with State Highway 158 in Midland to its intersection with State Highway 349 in Midland;
State Highway 349 from its intersection with Interstate Highway 20 in Midland to Lamesa;
U.S. Highway 87 from Lamesa to its intersection with Interstate Highway 27 in Lubbock;
Interstate Highway 27 from its intersection with U.S. Highway 87 in Lubbock to its intersection with U.S. Highway 287 in Amarillo; and
U.S. Highway 287 from its intersection with Interstate Highway 27 in Amarillo to the Oklahoma state border.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department shall design and construct identifying markers indicating the highway number, the designation as the Ports-to-Plains Corridor, and any other appropriate information.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: Except as provided by Subsection (d), the department shall erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

subsections.label: d
subsections.text: The department is not required to design, construct, or erect a marker required by this section unless a grant or donation is made to the department to cover the cost of the design, construction, and erection of the marker.

subsections.label: e
subsections.text: Money collected under Section 225.021 (General Provisions) for the purpose of implementing this section shall be deposited to the credit of the state highway fund.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2007, 80th Leg., R.S., Ch. 403 (S.B.850), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2007.
